TÜBİTAK 3005 Project Support for Prof. Dr. Banu Baybars

It is our distinct pleasure to announce that the project coordinated by

Prof. Dr. Banu Baybars

from the Faculty of Communication and entitled “Football Image in Turkey: Sports Communication and Crisis Management Strategies” has been funded by

TUBİTAK 3005 – Social Sciences and Humanities Program.

This project was designed to improve the public perception of football in Turkey and to develop innovative strategies in crisis management and sports communication. The project aims to go beyond traditional media approaches and introduce innovative models in digital communication and social media management.

We congratulate our faculty member for her achievement and wish her continued success.
